productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Solid Red Sweater
description: Composition Red pullover made of 100% cotton, has a ribbed V-neck with white tipping, short raglan ribbed sleeves with white tipping above the cuffs, ribbed hem with white tipping above the hem and Big Ben logo embroidered on the left chest Fit Regular Wash care Hand wash cold using mild detergent Do not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron Do not iron on decorations Subtle and stylish, this red sleeveless pullover from united colors of benetton speaks volumes about your heightened sense of style. The branding on the chest enhances your fashion statement, while the soft cotton fabric keeps you comfortable all day. Pair this with jeans and sports shoes Model statistics The product is a a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18&rdquo
